SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: TIER_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: 01–09 

COMMENT: For 2006–2009 this variable was found in the Part D Event Characteristics files. This variable is first 
available in the Formulary file in 2010. It is also present in the Excluded Drug file, starting with 2012
